text: There is something about content creators whose only content is like about how to make content and how to go viral. There's something about them that feels very like pyramid schemey and I don't have any like evidence or facts. I just feel it. It's like such a like it's such a cop-out video where you don't have to like do anything or like really think any like new thoughts or like entertain or teach people or be funny or show art. It's like it's sort of like creating this there's there's there's an exact rhyme or reason on how to become super viral on TikTok when that's like not the case and if you want to make it your job like that's that's totally fine like making money like advice about making money. I guess that's like a different hill. I'm not talking about not what I'm dying on and then the video is like here's how to do it just film and then keep posting. It just puts a B in my bonnet I don't know why it it puts a B in my bonnet and then there's that higher up wellness guy who's like not talking out about what's going on and everyone's mad at him you know as they should be like I don't think it's crazy to want to know that like the person you're following is like a good person like I understand that like POV but why we're following him in the first place his his content was like here's exactly how to be famous and it's like okay well you're not famous though I'm not throwing stones in this glass house I just washed it with Windex okay I'm not famous either but like having a lot of followers and being famous are two very different things in the age of social media. His name and I say this with empathy his name will never go down in history you know what I mean that he will not be someone who's remembered after like three years and let's all address the elephant in the room if he wasn't just if he wasn't like a buff white guy he probably have like max I'm gonna say like half of the following he has max a fourth so the message I would like to say is if you're gonna post online make it personal make it fun make it entertaining make it education make it artistic make it weird make it silly just I don't know find community in your real life first please you guys please or I urge you to find community in your real life before turning to social media for it
